task: AIP-003: 工厂函数重构 + 11个 API 端点 + main.py 注册+种子

details.factory: get_ai_provider(settings, account_id) - priority: test_mode→DB configs→env fallback→Mock. _build_from_config decrypts key, creates GenericOpenAICompatibleProvider. _get_env_ai_provider preserves original .env fallback chain.
details.api_endpoints: 11 endpoints: GET/POST list/create, PUT reorder, GET/PUT/DELETE account-overrides, GET/PATCH/DELETE config, POST config/test. Static paths before parameterized paths. SETTINGS_READ/SETTINGS_MANAGE permissions.
details.main.py: router import + include_router + lifespan seed logic (seed_from_env on startup)
